metadata.title: Karensa Studio
metadata.description: Software studio building websites, web apps and ERP systems.

hero.subtitle: Karensa is a software studio. We build websites, web apps, and ERP systems — from the first idea to production.

services.title: What we build
services.subtitle: From websites to internal systems — one team across design and engineering.

web.title: Web Design & Development
web.desc: Marketing sites, e-commerce and landing pages built with Next.js and Tailwind — fast to load and easy to maintain.

apps.title: Web Applications
apps.desc: Dashboards, platforms and SaaS products built for performance and scale.

erp.title: ERP & Business Systems
erp.desc: Custom ERP platforms and internal tools for operations, sales, finance and inventory.

cms.title: CMS & Content Platforms
cms.desc: Editor-friendly sites on PayloadCMS, Directus, WordPress and headless setups.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.desc: iOS and Android apps with React Native, ready for production.

social.title: Photography & Social Media
social.desc: Photography, video production and content management for social channels.

work.title: Recent work
work.subtitle: A few products and platforms we've built recently.

contact.title: Tell us about your project
contact.subtitle: Send a few details and we'll reply within one business day.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thanks — we'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

footer.tagline: A software studio building websites, web apps and ERP systems.

projects.subtitle: Showcasing technologies used and project activities
